name: County - City
description_short: County-City Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving Jefferson County, Watertown, Whitewater, and Cambridge with competitive loan and deposit rates.
description_long:
County-City Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial cooperative serving a specific geographic footprint in Wisconsin, including Jefferson County, the City of Watertown, the City of Whitewater, and the Village of Cambridge. The credit union positions itself as an alternative to traditional banks, emphasizing member benefits and community involvement as core differentiators. The organization actively participates in local philanthropy, reporting $7,035 in donations and 194 volunteer hours during 2025, demonstrating commitment to community development and quality of life initiatives. Membership is available to individuals living or working in the service area, as well as immediate family members of existing members, creating a family-friendly structure aligned with credit union principles.

County-City Credit Union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans, motorcycle loans, power sport financing, credit cards, mortgages, and various savings accounts. Auto loans are available at rates as low as 4.75% APR for new money borrowed, with extended 72-month terms available for vehicles six years old and newer. Credit card rates start at 11.74% APR with variable pricing tied to prime rate and credit score. The institution provides share certificates with rates up to 3.03% APY, along with standard checking and savings accounts. Their online and mobile banking platform enables members to manage accounts remotely, and Spanish-language services ("Se Habla Español") indicate efforts toward inclusive accessibility.

The credit union distinguishes itself through personalized service, with member testimonials praising staff helpfulness and the superior experience compared to traditional banks. Their emphasis on community involvement, transparent rate structures with detailed disclaimers, and family membership eligibility reflect traditional credit union values. The organization maintains a direct phone line (920.674.5542) for customer support and offers multiple application pathways for loans, membership, and accounts. The rates offered are competitive within their market segment, particularly for auto and vehicle financing, with variable credit card rates tied to Wall Street Journal prime rates ensuring market alignment.

However, potential members should understand that County-City Credit Union serves a limited geographic area, making membership unavailable for those outside Jefferson County and the specified municipalities unless they have family connections to existing members. As a credit union rather than a bank, deposit accounts are NCUA-insured rather than FDIC-insured, though both provide equivalent protections. The website does not prominently display fee structures, minimum balance requirements, or the full range of product terms, requiring members to contact the institution directly for complete details. Additionally, loan rates vary significantly based on credit score and term, meaning advertised "as low as" rates may not be available to all applicants.
services: Auto loans (cars, trucks) at rates as low as 4.75% APR
Power sport financing (ATVs, UTVs, boats, snowmobiles, jet skis)
Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinancing
Credit cards with variable rates based on prime rate and credit score
Share certificates (deposit accounts) with rates up to 3.03% APY
pros: Auto and vehicle loans available at competitive rates as low as 4.75% APR with 72-month terms for newer vehicles
Share certificates offering up to 3.03% APY for savers seeking guaranteed returns
Bilingual services with Spanish-language support ("Se Habla Español") available
Mobile app and online banking platform for remote account management and transactions
Strong community involvement with documented charitable giving ($7,035) and volunteer hours (194 in 2025)
Family membership eligibility allows immediate relatives of members to join without geographic restrictions
Credit card with 25-day grace period on purchases to avoid finance charges
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Jefferson County, Watertown, Whitewater, and Cambridge (plus family members of existing members)
Variable credit card rate tied to prime rate changes quarterly, creating payment uncertainty for cardholders
Website lacks detailed information on fees, minimum balances, and complete product terms; requires direct contact for specifics
Advertised loan rates marked "as low as" with rates varying significantly by credit score and term, meaning many applicants will not qualify for advertised rates
No mention of overdraft protection, ATM access network, or other convenience services that traditional banks routinely offer
best_for: Residents of Jefferson County, Watertown, Whitewater, or Cambridge seeking competitive auto and vehicle financing
Families and households with existing credit union members who want to consolidate finances within the same institution
Spanish-speaking consumers who prefer bilingual financial services and support
Community-minded members who value local philanthropy and prefer supporting not-for-profit financial institutions
diagnosis: County-City Credit Union is best suited for residents within its specific geographic service area (Jefferson County and select Wisconsin cities) who value competitive vehicle financing rates and community-focused banking. The main caveat is the strict membership eligibility requirement based on location or family connections—consumers outside the service area cannot join unless they have relatives who are existing members, making this institution inaccessible to much of the general population.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: County - City — Credit Union in JEFFERSON, WI | CreditDoc
meta_description: County - City — NCUA-insured credit union in JEFFERSON, WI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
